snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi, UserProfile, UserProfileVerification

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.create_user(
    password="password",
    profile=UserProfile(
        name="name",
        verification=UserProfileVerification(),
        ssn="ssn",
    ),
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi, UserProfile, UserProfileVerification

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.create_user(
        password="password",
        profile=UserProfile(
            name="name",
            verification=UserProfileVerification(),
            ssn="ssn",
        ),
    )


asyncio.run(main())
